reviews.comment:
Alguien me puede pasar la dirección y o número de teléfono del local que se ve en la foto de enfrente fui a comprar y me olvidé la.billetera por favor era un señora rubia que tiene almacén gracias por su ayuda el local morado que se vee

(Translated by Google)
Can someone please give me the address and/or phone number of the shop in the photo across the street? I went there to buy something and forgot my wallet. It was a blonde lady who owns a store. Thank you for your help. The shop is purple.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Malísimo. Se les escapó la Tortuga. Que lentitud para servir por el amor de Dios. Tienen 3 colas y sirve un solo playero, de a un vehículo por vez. Interminable, me fui después de esperar 10 minutos sin moverme

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. They completely messed up. The service was so slow, for crying out loud. They have three lines and only one attendant, serving one vehicle at a time. It was endless; I left after waiting 10 minutes without moving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd3M3TktREAE
